seoTitle: Sanctuary Point vs Sandgate — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Sanctuary Point and Sandgate. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Sanctuary Point vs Sandgate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Sanctuary Point and Sandgate.
heading: Sanctuary Point vs Sandgate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Sanctuary Point, New South Wales and Sandgate, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Sanctuary Point has a lower overall climate risk score (39/100) compared to Sandgate (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Sanctuary Point or Sandgate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Sanctuary Point has a flood risk score of 31/100, while Sandgate scores 47/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Sanctuary Point scores 42/100 for bushfire risk. Sandgate scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Sanctuary Point or Sandgate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Sanctuary Point has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.5% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
